modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Not receiving emails sent to my alternate email address.

full_description_text: People are trying to email me at my alternate email, but they’re not getting through. There’s some confusion with the two emails I have. It’s causing issues with communication.
short_description: Not receiving emails sent to my alternate email address.
description: People are trying to email me at my alternate email, but they’re not getting through. There’s some confusion with the two emails I have. It’s causing issues with communication.
